summary: Eculizumab is clinically utilized in select cases of myasthenia gravis, specifically among patients who are positive for acetylcholine receptor antibodies and have refractory disease that does not respond adequately to standard treatments. Its use reflects targeted intervention through complement pathway blockade rather than broad application.
